review: 7am cant order eggs "because we did it" the lady said three times. even after trying to ask what that meant i still dont know but i couldnt order breakfast at 7am. i biked here specifically for an offer on the app and then found out they arent selling breakfast this morning ehich means the app didnt work as it said i can get an egg wrap. 0/10 service and satisfaction. i am home 30min later emty stomach and extremely mad at this company.

Used to be a good app. Was by far the best of any major chain restaurant. I liked the ease of use, the simplicity of pickup options, and the auto-charging to my credit card.
